title: Onion Holder for Slicing, Stainless Steel Slicer Onion Cutter for Slicing, Vegetable Cutter for Potato and Tomato, Lemon Avocados, Eggs, Food Slicer Assistant Tool (1 P)
features: Multifunctional Onion Slicer: The Onion Holder Slicer features 10 stainless steel forks for a comfortable grip and precise, even slicing of onions, tomatoes, lemons, and meats. Say goodbye to messy cuts!
Versatile Kitchen Tool: More than just an onion slicer, this tool is perfect for a wide variety of fruits, vegetables, and meats. Its sturdy design and sharp prongs make slicing quick and easy.
Convenient & Easy to Use: The ergonomic design ensures a secure grip, allowing you to slice without the need to use your hands, making the whole process more efficient and safer.

Time-Saving Design: Equipped with sharp prongs to prevent slippage, this slicer guarantees even cuts for a variety of foods like onions, avocados, and eggs. Less time slicing, more time enjoying your meals!
Dishwasher Safe: Cleanup is a breeze with this easy-to-clean slicer. Its smooth surface and durable material make it dishwasher safe, saving you time and effort in the kitchen.
description: Onion Holder for Slicing, Stainless Steel Slicer Onion Cutter for Slicing, Vegetable Cutter for Potato and Tomato, Lemon Avocados, Eggs, Food Slicer Assistant Tool
